<!-- Thanks for sending a PR. Fill every section so review goes fast. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One paragraph. What was wrong, what you did, what behaviour now differs. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Use "Closes #123" so the issue auto-closes when this PR merges. Use "Refs #123" for partial fixes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behaviour changes; explain migration below)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Manual steps, automated tests, or both. Include the actual commands you ran. -->

- [ ] Verified locally with `docker compose up`
- [ ] Verified locally with frontend dev server (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Backend tests pass (if you added any)
- [ ] No console errors in browser during the change

## Screenshots / video

<!-- For UI changes attach before/after. Drag-drop into this textarea. -->

## Migration notes

<!-- Only fill in if this PR breaks an existing API, DB schema, or settings format. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the existing style (no new ESLint/Pyflakes warnings)
- [ ] I updated docs / README if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or absolute local paths
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive and lowercase-first (no AI co-authors)
